(1) इन िनयम犘 को 瀡वापक औषिध एवं मन:灹भावी पदाथ榁 (चतुथ榁 संशोधन) िनयमावली, 2015 कहा जाएगा। (2) ये शासक琉य राजप灴 म犆 灹काशन क琉 तारीख से 灹वृ牵 ह犘गे। 2. 瀡वापक औषिध एंव मन:灹भावी पदाथ榁 िनयमावली, 1985 (एति瀙मन प瀙चात िजसे उ榉त िनयमावली से संद琔भत 琈कया गया है) के िनयम 43 म犆, उपिनयम (1) के बाद िन瀓निलिखत परंतुक को अंत:瀡थािपत 琈कया जाएगा, यथा- ‘’बशत犇 琈क इस उप-िनयम म犆 संद琔भत नो琇टस उस मामले म犆 नह牷 लागू होगी िजसम犆 琈क ऐसी अ灹瀄यािशत प琇रि瀡थितय犘 के कारण िजन पर 琈क लाइस犆सधारी का कोई िनयं灴ण नह牷 हो सकता है उ瀄पादन बंद हो गया हो।‘’। 3. उ榉त िनयमावली म犆, िनयम 52क म犆, उप-िनयम (8) के 瀡थान पर िन瀓निलिखत उप-िनयम को 灹ित瀡थािपत 琈कया जाएगा, यथा- ‘’(8) कोई िविनमा榁ता आव瀙यक 瀡वापक औषिधय犘 को उतनी मा灴ा म犆 रख सकता है िजतनी 琈क इस िनयमावली के िनयम 36, िनयम 36क, या िनयम 37 के अंतग榁त जारी 琈कए गए लाइस犆स या उ榉त अिधिनयम क琉 धारा 10 के अंतग榁त रा榖य सरकार 獧ारा बनाए गए िनयम犘 के अंतग榁त आव瀙यक 瀡वापक औषिधय犘 के सि瀓म炈ण का िविनमा榁ण करने के िलए जारी 琈कए गए लाइस犆स म犆 िविन琖द瀠ट 琈कया गया हो। बशत犇 琈क सरकारी अफ琉म कारखाने पर आव瀙यक 瀡वापक औषिधय犘 के रखने से संबंिधत कोई सीमा नह牷 है।‘’। 4. उ榉त िनयमावली म犆 िनयम 52च म犆, उप-िनयम (1) के 瀡थान पर िन瀓निलिखत उपिनयम को 灹ित瀡थािपत 琈कया जाएगा, यथा :- -- 1 of 3 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] ‘’(1) कोई िविनमा榁ता अथवा लाइस犆瀡ड डीलर ि灹ि瀡灙瀉शन के अित琇र猴 आव瀙यक 瀡वापक औषिधय犘 क琉 िब灙琉 िन瀓निलिखत को करेगा – (क) ऐसे िविनमा榁ता को िजसे इस िनयमावली के िनयम 37 के अंतग榁त लाइस犆स जारी 琈कया गया हो या आव瀙यक 瀡वापक औषिधय犘 के सि瀓म炈ण का िविनमा榁ण करने वाले िविनमा榁ता को िजसको 琈क इस अिधिनयम क琉 धारा 10 के अंतग榁त रा榖य सरकार 獧ारा बनाए गए िनयम犘 के अंतग榁त लाइस犆स जारी 琈कया गया हो; (ख) लाइस犆瀡ड डीलर; (ग) लाइस犆瀡ड केिम瀡ट; (घ) पंजीकृत िच琈क瀄सक; (ङ) ऐसा 瀘यि猴 जो 琈क इस िनयमावली के अंतग榁त औषिध िनयं灴क के 獧ारा 灹ािधकृत 琈कया गया हो; अथवा (च) मा瀈यता 灹ा瀉त िच琈क瀄सा सं瀡था।‘’। [फा. सं.एन/11011/1/2014-एनसी-II] स瀄य नारायण दास, अवर सिचव 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉पणी णी णी णी :::: 灹धान िनयम भारत के राजप灴, असाधारण के, भाग II, खंड-3, उपखंड (i) म犆 सा.का.िन. सं. 837(अ) के अंतग榁त 琈दनांक 14 नव瀓बर, 1985 को 灹कािशत 琈कए गए थे और 琈दनांक 26 (अ), 琈दनांक 19 माच榁, 2002 क琉 सा.का.िन. सं. 214 (अ), 琈दनांक 14 नव瀓बर, 2002 क琉 सा.का.िन. सं. 763(अ), 琈दनांक 21 फरवरी, 2003 क琉 सा.का.िन.सं.763 (अ), 琈दनांक 21 फरवरी, 2003 क琉 सा.का.िन. सं.115 (अ), 琈दनांक सा.का.िन. सं. 736(अ), 琈दनांक 13 अ榉तूबर, 2006 क琉 सा.का.िन. सं. 639(अ), 琈दनांक 01 जनवरी, 2008 क琉 सा.का.िन. सं. 2(अ), 琈दनांक 13 जुलाई, 2010 क琉 का.आ. सं. 1661(अ), 琈दनांक 11 अ灹ैल,2011 क琉 का.आ. सं. 739(अ), 琈दनांक 22 जून, 2011 क琉 सा.का.िन. सं. 470(अ), 琈दनांक 28 琈दस瀓बर, 2011क琉 सा.का.िन.सं. 905(अ), 琈दनांक 01 जुलाई, 2014 क琉 सा.का.िन. सं. 426(अ), 琈दनांक 05 फरवरी, 2015 क琉 सा.का.िन. सं. 74(अ), 琈दनांक 25 माच榁, 2015 क琉 सा.का.िन. सं. 224(अ), और 琈दनांक 05 मई, 2015 क琉 सा.का.िन. सं. 359(अ) 獧ारा बाद म犆 संशोिधत 琈कए गए थे। MINISTRY OF FINANCE (Department of Revenue) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 17th June, 2015 G.S.R. 500(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 9, read with section 76 of the Narcotic Drugs and Psychotropic Substances Act, 1985 (61 of 1985), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Narcotic Drugs and Psychotropic Substances Rules, 1985, namely:— 1. (1) These rules may be called the Narcotic Drugs and Psychotropic Substances (Fourth Amendment) Rules, 2015. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. -- 2 of 3 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3(i)º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 3 2. In the Narcotic Drugs and Psychotropic Substances Rules, 1985 (hereinafter referred to as the said rules), in rule 43, after sub-rule (1), the following proviso shall be inserted, namely:— “Provided that the notice referred to in this sub-rule shall not apply in case the cessation of manufacture is on account of unforeseen circumstances beyond the control of the licencee.”. 3. In the said rules, in rule 52A, for sub-rule (8), the following sub-rule shall be substituted, namely:— “(8) A manufacturer may possess essential narcotic drug in such quantity as may be specified in the licence issued under rule 36, rule 36A, or rule 37 of these rules or the licence issued for manufacturing the preparations of essential narcotic drugs under the rules made by the State Government under section 10 of the Act: Provided that there shall be no limit to the possession of essential narcotic drug by the Government Opium Factories. ”. 4. In the said rules, in rule 52F, for sub-rule (1), the following sub-rule shall be substituted, namely:— “(1) A manufacturer or licenced dealer shall sell essential narcotic drugs otherwise than on prescription to– (a) a manufacturer who has been issued a licence under rule 37 of these rules or a manufacture of preparations of essential narcotic drugs who has been issued a licence under the rules made by the State Government under section 10 of the Act; (b) a licenced dealer; (c) a licenced chemist; (d) a registered medical practitioner; (e) a person who has been authorised by the Controller of Drugs under these rules; or (f) a recognized medical institution. ”. [F. No. N/11011/1/2014-NC-II] SATYA NARAYANA DASH, Under Secy. Note.-The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (i) vide number G.S.R.837(E), dated the 14th November, 1985 and subsequently amended vide notifications numbers S.O. 786 (E), dated the 26th October, 1992, S.O. 599(E), dated the 10th August, 1993, G.S.R. 748(E), dated the 14th December, 1993, G.S.R. 543, dated the 24th October, 1994, G.S.R. 82, dated the 14th February, 1995, G.S.R. 556(E), dated the 14th July, 1995, G.S.R. 25(E), dated the 12th January, 1996, G.S.R. 509(E), dated the 4th November, 1996, G.S.R. 350 (E), dated the 25th June, 1997, G.S.R. 214(E), dated the 19th March, 2002, G.S.R. 763(E), dated 14th November, 2002, G.S.R. 115(E), dated the 21st February, 2003, G.S.R. 129 (E), dated the 26th February, 2003, G.S.R. 217(E), dated the 17th March, 2003, G.S.R. 95(E), dated the 4th February, 2004, G.S.R. 104 (E), dated the 25th February, 2005, G.S.R. 736 (E), dated the 22nd December, 2005, G.S.R. 639(E), dated the 13th October, 2006, G.S.R. 2 (E), dated the 1st January, 2008, S.O. 1661(E), dated the 13th July, 2010, S.O. 739(E), dated the 11th April, 2011, G.S.R. 470(E), dated 21st June, 2011, G.S.R. 905(E), dated 28th December, 2011, G.S.R. 426(E), dated 1st July, 2014, G.S.R. 74(E), dated 5th February, 2015, G.S.R. 224(E), dated 25th March, 2015 and G.S.R. 359(E), dated 5th May, 2015.
